title: Geometry
objective: Calculate the Euclidean distance between two points. Given particle at (0,0) and target at (3,4), compute distance and store in particle.x.

title: Vectors
objective: Decompose a vector into its x and y components. Given magnitude 10 and angle 0 degrees, set particle.vx to 10 and particle.vy to 0.

title: Trigonometry
objective: Use sine and cosine to compute vector components. Given magnitude 5 and angle 60 degrees, set particle.vx and particle.vy to the correct components.
